generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Deploys in physical building to detect occupancy changes, feeding real-time data into the DT system for synchronization. Integrated into BIM models via TwinLight project."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures indoor temperature in real-time, transmitting data to DT via Eclipse Hono for edge processing. Used in BOREALIS for reinforcement learning-based control policies."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Monitors ambient light levels for adaptive lighting control systems. Sensor configurations embedded directly in BIM models via TwinLight project."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Tracks energy consumption across building systems, providing runtime data for predictive analytics in BOREALIS project."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
]

instance BuildingControlSystemSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Aggregates data from BCS components (HVAC, lighting) for real-time synchronization with DT. Metadata extracted from BIM models configures these interactions."
    DTDFVocab:producedData BcsDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data transmitted from physical sensors to DT via Eclipse Hono edge connectivity, processed by Eclipse Ditto for synchronization."
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
    base:desc "Temperature readings sent to DT in real-time using Eclipse Hono, enabling adaptive control policies in BOREALIS."
]

instance LightLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
    base:desc "Ambient light measurements transmitted to DT for TwinLight adaptive lighting control, synchronized via Eclipse Ditto."
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyMeter
    base:desc "Energy consumption metrics streamed to DT for predictive analytics, processed through Eclipse Hono/Ditto pipeline."
]

instance BcsDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BuildingControlSystemSensor
    base:desc "Aggregated BCS data (HVAC, lighting) transmitted to DT for bidirectional control synchronization, configured via BIM metadata."
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantic backbone of the DT system, enriched with device metadata (sensor/actuator configurations, control logic) from Autodesk Revit and other BIM tools."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance RuntimeIoTSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time operational data from IoT sensors and BCS systems, processed via Eclipse Hono/Ditto for synchronization with the virtual twin."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted, TemperatureDataTransmitted, LightLevelDataTransmitted, EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted, BcsDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D representation in Unreal Engine 5, enabling immersive monitoring and simulation of building operations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5Enabler
]

instance ReinforcementLearningControlPolicy : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Domain-specific control policies from BOREALIS project, optimizing energy consumption, visual comfort, and non-visual health effects using real-time sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

instance AdaptiveLightingControlLogic : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Lighting control semantics from TwinLight project, embedding adaptive strategies directly into BIM models for automated deployment."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Automates DT deployment from BIM using model-driven engineering principles, generating deployable artifacts for runtime systems."
    DTDFVocab:enables AutomatedDeploymentService, ControlPolicyOptimizationService
]

instance EclipseHonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Provides real-time edge connectivity and data exchange between physical sensors and the DT, ensuring low-latency synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance EclipseDittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Manages digital twin instances and enables bidirectional communication between physical and virtual components, supporting dynamic configuration."
    DTDFVocab:enables DigitalTwinManagementService, BidirectionalControlService
]

instance UnrealEngine5Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Delivers rich, interactive visualization capabilities for immersive monitoring and simulation of building operations."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance BimToolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Facilitates modeling and configuration of devices within BIM environment (e.g., Autodesk Revit), serving as the semantic backbone for DT deployment."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelConfigurationService, MetadataExtractionService
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls adaptive lighting systems in physical building, executing commands generated by TwinLight control policies from the DT."
]

instance HvacActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Manages HVAC systems via programmable logic controllers, receiving real-time adjustments from BOREALIS reinforcement learning policies."
]

instance PlcController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Programmable logic controller interfacing with building automation systems, translating DT control signals into physical actions."
]

// C6: Services
instance AutomatedDeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates runtime artifacts (Hono/Ditto configurations) from BIM models via model-to-model/text transformations, enabling automated DT deployment."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeploymentInsight, ConfigurationAction
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuously tracks building operations using real-time sensor data, processed through Eclipse Hono/Ditto pipeline."
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalInsight, AlertAction
]

instance ControlPolicyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Iteratively refines control policies using reinforcement learning (BOREALIS) and adaptive strategies (TwinLight) based on runtime data."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight, PolicyUpdateAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides interactive 3D visualization of building operations in Unreal Engine 5, enabling immersive monitoring for facility managers."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualInsight, SimulationAction
]

instance DigitalTwinManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Manages DT instances and their configurations, supporting bidirectional communication and runtime adjustments without full redeployment."
    DTDFVocab:provides SynchronizationInsight, ConfigurationAction
]

instance BidirectionalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables real-time control synchronization between DT and physical building components (actuators, controllers) via Eclipse Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlInsight, ActuationAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance DeploymentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation of automated deployment artifacts generated from BIM models, ensuring consistency with physical infrastructure."
]

instance OperationalInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time performance metrics of building operations, enabling proactive adjustments to maintain optimal conditions."
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Energy consumption patterns and control policy effectiveness, derived from BOREALIS reinforcement learning analysis."
]

instance VisualInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building operations, supporting facility managers in monitoring and decision-making."
]

instance SynchronizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric evaluating fidelity of synchronization between physical and virtual representations."
]

instance ControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time status of control synchronization between DT and physical building components, enabling verification of bidirectional communication."
]

instance ConfigurationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of DT configurations without full redeployment, supported by runtime configuration management."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated alerts triggered by deviations in operational parameters, enabling immediate corrective actions."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PolicyUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Iterative refinement of control policies using reinforcement learning, optimizing for energy, comfort, and health metrics."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SimulationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Execution of what-if scenarios in Unreal Engine 5 to evaluate potential operational changes before physical implementation."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ActuationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Execution of control signals from DT to physical actuators (lighting, HVAC) via bidirectional communication protocols."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ModelConfigurationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Configures device metadata and control logic within BIM models, enabling automated deployment to the DT system."
    DTDFVocab:provides ConfigurationInsight
]

instance MetadataExtractionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Extracts device metadata from BIM models to configure sensor-actuator interactions in the DT system."
    DTDFVocab:provides MetadataInsight
]

instance ConfigurationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation of device metadata extracted from BIM models, ensuring compatibility with DT deployment requirements."
]

instance MetadataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of device metadata extracted from BIM models, supporting configuration of sensor-actuator interactions."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The **virtual-to-physical interaction** involves the DT generating **control signals, optimization commands, or adaptive policies** that are transmitted back to the physical building. These outputs are executed via **actuators and controllers** (e.g., lighting systems, HVAC) integrated into the BIM model. The **TwinLight** project enables **automated commissioning** of control logic, while **BOREALIS** uses **reinforcement learning** to dynamically adjust control policies based on real-time feedback. The DT framework ensures **low-latency communication** through **Eclipse Hono/Ditto**, enabling seamless execution of virtual decisions in the physical domain."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The **twinning time-scale** is **real-time**, with continuous synchronization between the physical building and its DT. The framework supports **sub-second latency** for critical operations (e.g., lighting control) and **near-real-time updates** for broader monitoring tasks. The **ODTE metric** evaluates the entanglement quality, ensuring high fidelity in synchronization. The **BOREALIS** project demonstrates iterative refinement of control policies using **post-occupancy sensor data**, suggesting a **dynamic, adaptive time-scale** for evolving services."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **modular, service-oriented architecture** with three key roles:
  - **Building Control Engineers**: Model devices and configure control logic in BIM.
  - **Facility Managers**: Monitor and control operations via the DT.
  - **DT Engineers**: Extend functionality through custom services.
  The framework acts as a **central hub**, facilitating bidirectional data exchange between the physical building and its virtual twin. The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to evaluate the constellation’s interoperability and architectural soundness."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates across **all life-cycle stages** of the building, from **design and construction** to **refurbishment and adaptive operations**. It covers representations of the physical counterpart in three key phases:
  - **As-designed (ideal)**: Leveraging BIM models for initial deployment.
  - **As-manufactured**: Incorporating real-time data from construction and commissioning phases.
  - **As-operated**: Continuously synchronizing with operational data (e.g., sensor readings, control signals) to enable adaptive management. The framework ensures **long-term compatibility** with AECO standards and existing systems."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**: Quantifies the alignment between the DT and its physical counterpart.
  - **Automated validation** of BIM models before deployment.
  - **Real-time synchronization** via Eclipse Hono/Ditto to minimize drift.
  - **Uncertainty management**: Addressed through iterative refinement (e.g., **BOREALIS**’ reinforcement learning).
  The framework prioritizes **semantic coherence** and **bidirectional communication** to maintain high fidelity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The **technical connection** between the physical twin (PT) and DT is established via:
  - **Eclipse Hono**: Provides **edge connectivity** and real-time data exchange.
  - **Eclipse Ditto**: Manages **digital twin instances** and ensures bidirectional communication.
  - **Standardized protocols**: Enabling interoperability between BIM, IoT sensors, and BCS.
  The connection supports **low-latency, high-fidelity data transmission** for both monitoring and control."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted and deployed as a **modular, cloud-edge architecture**:
  - **Centralized deployment**: For large-scale building infrastructures.
  - **Edge deployment**: For latency-sensitive applications (e.g., lighting control).
  The framework automates deployment via **model-driven transformations**, reducing manual effort. **Unreal Engine 5** is used for **visualization hosting**, while **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** manage runtime operations."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT supports **horizontal integration** with external systems via:
  - **Standardized extension points** for third-party service integration.
  - **Interoperability with AECO standards** (e.g., BIM, IFC).
  - **Open-source frameworks** (e.g., Eclipse Hono/Ditto) for cross-platform compatibility.
  The framework ensures seamless data exchange with **other DTs, IoT platforms, or enterprise systems**."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to **AECO-specific standards**, including:
  - **Building Information Modeling (BIM)** as the semantic backbone.
  - **Industry Foundation Classes (IFC)** for data exchange.
  - **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** for standardized digital twin management.
  The framework also supports **modular extensibility** via predefined extension points, ensuring compliance with evolving standards."
]
